subcodes.first_line: God hath indeed heard thy call, and answereth thee from the direction of the Throne. Hearken thou unto that which is revealed unto thee: verily, there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع الله ندائک و یجیبک عن جهه العرش ان استمع ما یوحی الیک انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @angels
